title: Elytra Fairy Wings
description: ✨ A whimsical resource pack that transforms Elytra into soft, magical fairy wings! Perfect for fantasy builds, roleplay, cuter elytra, or players who love a little sparkle.
body:
![A cinematic shot centered on a minecraft character facing the sunset with their back turned towards the camera. They are wearing the Elytra Fairy Wings to showcase how magical they look with this view.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c3706332b171fed1ddd5284029b2e00331b6c6a_0.webp)



🧚‍♀️ **Elytra Fairy Wings** is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that replaces the default Elytra texture and shape with white, soft, magical fairy wings. Designed for fantasy fans, cottagecore builders, and magical roleplayers, this cute elytra pack gives your flight a whimsical flair.



- ✔️ Works with all armor trims and dye combinations
- 🎨 Compatible with shaders & other visual mods
- 🪄 Easy drop-in install – no mods needed



Whether you're soaring through enchanted forests or flying over cozy mushroom villages, these fairy wings will make your adventures truly magical.



👤 Created by Avrok
